title: with statements should be avoided
description: The with statement introduces a new scope, where properties of an object can be accessed directly without having to specify the object’s name explicitly. However, using it is generally considered a bad practice and is strongly discouraged. While it might seem convenient at first, it can lead to several issues: The with statement can make code more ambiguous and harder to read.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

noncompliant.description: Using with statement to access object properties directly

checks.message: With statements should be avoided - use direct object references instead
